summary.quantification_method: peak height comparison of extracted ion chromatograms (XICs)

primary_variables.matched_definition: Intervention using an agonist or activator that increases receptor, pathway, or signaling activity relative to control.
evidence: rHSP47 treatment increased collagen secretion, reduced collagen posttranslational modifications and intracellular collagen retention
The drug effect on collagen deposition was also evaluated in fibroblasts from patients with collagen I mutations

primary_variables.matched_definition: Comparison between disease and matched control cohorts.
evidence: Our study examined skin biopsies from male (n = 1) and female (n = 2) individuals with OI and individuals without disease acting as controls.
Collagen I was extracted... from culture media of control, OI proband 3, and rHSP47-treated OI proband 3 primary fibroblasts

attributes.route_or_context: incubated with 0.5 μM rHSP47 (dissolved in PBS) or with placebo (same volume of PBS)
evidence: cells were incubated with 0.5 μM rHSP47 (dissolved in PBS) or with placebo (same volume of PBS) for 16 hours

attributes.route_or_context: collagen secretion and matrix incorporation experiments
evidence: cells were subjected to a 4-hour pulse incubation with rHSP47/placebo every other day

replicate_hints: Media from 3 T25 confluent flasks for each condition were collected every other day for 3 times and pulled.

evidence: The peak heights of the monoisotopic extracted ion chromatograms... from control, OI proband 3, and rHSP47-treated OI proband 3 fibroblasts were compared

The ratio between the peak intensity of modified peptides and the total intensity of all corresponding peptide forms... indicated an increased O-glycosylation of both collagen α1(I) and α2(I) chains in OI proband cells.

quantification_strategy: peak height comparison of extracted ion chromatograms (XICs)

base_candidates_ranked.reason: Data-dependent acquisition (DDA) on Q-Exactive Orbitrap with label-free quantification (LFQ) based on peak heights of extracted ion chromatograms (XICs).

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: The study specifically identifies and quantifies modification ratios at specific lysine residues (e.g., α1-K603, α2-K264).

trigger_keywords: peak heights of the monoisotopic extracted ion chromatograms
